dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION The recommended dose is one drop of AZOPT in the affected eye(s) 3 times daily. Shake well before use. AZOPT may be used concomitantly with other topical ophthalmic drug products to lower IOP. If more than one topical ophthalmic drug is being used, the drugs should be administered at least 10 minutes apart. • Instill one drop in the affected eye(s) 3 times daily.
